creator: paulbeard@gmail.com
text:
===>   cups-samba-6.0_7 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> cups-windows-6.0-source.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://ftp.easysw.com/pub/cups/windows/cups-windows-6.0-source.tar.gz

could be a network problem:

ping ftp.easysw.com
PING ftp.easysw.com (208.96.52.102): 56 data bytes
Request timeout for icmp_seq 0
Request timeout for icmp_seq 1
Request timeout for icmp_seq 2

But I don't know if easysw.com exists or is now cups.org.

Fix: 

n/a
How-To-Repeat: 	cd /usr/ports/print/cups-samba; make
